task_specific_assessments.scorability: cannot_determine - This video contains educational/instructional content only. No clear individual performance attempt with timed start and completion is visible. Multiple instructors demonstrate technique, but no single trainee executes a complete, timed peg transfer task from beginning to end.

confidence_rationale: This video is clearly a training facility tour and group instructional session at LAMA Training Academy. It shows setup, equipment overview, instructor demonstrations, and group learning activities, but does NOT show an individual trainee performing a complete, official peg transfer task with timing. No discrete completion time can be identified. Therefore, per the rubric, this is classified as 'instructional' and should not be scored as a performance.
cannot_determine: Completion time - no individual timed performance visible
Penalties - no complete task execution to assess
FLS score - instructional content, not a performance attempt
technique_summary: Video is an instructional/educational recording of a training session at LAMA Training Academy. Shows facility tour, group training, instructor demonstrations of peg transfer setup and dissector handling, but does not contain a scorable individual performance.

demonstrated_techniques: Proper Maryland dissector grip at the handle
Two-handed instrument positioning over peg transfer board
Approach angle and hand placement for object pickup
Peg transfer board layout and task structure
verbal_cues: Instructors providing guidance to participants (content not fully audible in frames)
common_errors_addressed: Proper instrument control (instructors demonstrate correct technique)
teaching_content.skill_level_demonstrated: instructional - multiple expert instructors teaching trainees

improvement_suggestions: If scoring peg transfer tasks, ensure each video captures a single, unambiguous timed individual performance from first object touched to last object released.
